label: Français
audience: Developers integrating the ProAbono API Live into their application.
tone: Technical, precise. Use 'vous' (formal second person). Avoid overly formal or administrative register.
notes: 'Business' and 'Segment' are ProAbono proper nouns — always keep them in English, even mid-sentence.
'Offer' and 'Offre' are synonyms in ProAbono; 'plan' is the legacy synonym — always translate 'plan' to 'offre' in French prose.
Do not translate API field names (e.g. ReferenceCustomer, IdSegment), enum values (e.g. Enabled, Suspended), HTTP methods, endpoint paths, JSON code blocks, or action identifiers (e.g. customer.get).
Translate MDX frontmatter values (title, sidebar_label) but never the keys.
Do not translate inline code wrapped in backticks.
